TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Calavi Itiniay i Taimali Cen no Taitung ko Calavi a niyaro', 81 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 217 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 211 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 96%. O pito'oran no finawlan ira ko tosa a kinkay itini. O kasiikedan no niyaro' liwkoay a tayal
S.PHON: ʦaɾab~vi itiniaj i taimaɾi ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ʦaɾab~vi a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan **%. o~u pito~uʡo~uran no~u finawɾan ira ko~u to~usa a kinkaj itini. o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ ɾiwko~uaj a tajaɾ
S.FORM: Calavi Itiniay i Taimali Cen no Taitung ko Calavi a niyaro', 81 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 217 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 211 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 96%. O pito'oran no finawlan ira ko tosa a kinkay itini. O kasiikedan no niyaro' liwkoay a tayal
S.PHON: ʦaɾab~vi itiniaj i taimaɾi ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ʦaɾab~vi a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan **%. o~u pito~uʡo~uran no~u finawɾan ira ko~u to~usa a kinkaj itini. o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ ɾiwko~uaj a tajaɾ
